containerDefinitions.name: luciel-backend
command:
import os, sys
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, text
url = os.environ["DATABASE_URL"]
eng = create_engine(url, future=True)
ok = True
with eng.connect() as conn:
    r = conn.execute(text("SELECT data_type, udt_name, is_nullable FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema='public' AND table_name='admins' AND column_name='last_signup_ip'")).first()
    if r is None:
        print("FAIL: admins.last_signup_ip column missing"); ok=False
    else:
        print(f"column data_type={r[0]} udt_name={r[1]} is_nullable={r[2]}")
        if r[1] != "inet": print("FAIL udt_name not inet"); ok=False
        if r[2] != "YES": print("FAIL not nullable"); ok=False
    r = conn.execute(text("SELECT indexdef FROM pg_indexes WHERE schemaname='public' AND tablename='admins' AND indexname='ix_admins_last_signup_ip'")).first()
    if r is None:
        print("FAIL: ix_admins_last_signup_ip missing"); ok=False
    else:
        print(f"index.def={r[0]}")
        if "last_signup_ip IS NOT NULL" not in r[0] or "active" not in r[0]:
            print("FAIL partial index predicate"); ok=False
    r = conn.execute(text("SELECT version_num FROM alembic_version")).first()
    print(f"alembic.head={r[0]}")
    if r[0] != "arc7_b_admins_last_signup_ip":
        print("FAIL alembic head"); ok=False
print("RESULT:", "PASS" if ok else "FAIL")
sys.exit(0 if ok else 1)
